source: FiveThirtyEight NBA Elo dataset (nba-elo folder of the fivethirtyeight/data GitHub repository)
directory_note: Directory is named 2026-07-19 (session start date); retrieval completed 2026-07-20. A rename was blocked by a file-sync lock; this manifest is authoritative for the retrieval date.
retrieval_method: HTTPS download from raw.githubusercontent.com at a pinned commit
license: CC BY 4.0 (repository-wide LICENSE file; copy preserved as LICENSE_fivethirtyeight_data, byte-identical to the copy in the nba-raptor snapshot)
code_version: retrieval performed via curl during the PCE-era data-source audit; repository commit at retrieval recorded in the audit report

nbaallelo.csv.grain: one row per team per game (two rows per game, _iscopy flag)
